reference: Hi, I am twenty-six years old and I have a tiny movable lump on my lower left abdomen about the size of my fingertip. It doesn't hurt to push on, but I have discomfort very frequently on that side and have had it for three months now. I just gave birth five months ago to my second child. I am very worried this is ovarian cancer due to all I have read online. Does this sound normal for ovarian cancer? There has been no change in my bowel movements, my periods are very regular, but I do experience some hip and back pain occasionally on that same side.
text: Hi, I'm 26 years old, and I have a tiny, movable lump on my lower left abdomen, about this size of my fingertips. It doesn't hurt to push on, but I have discomfort. Frequently on that side, and I've had it for 3 months now. I just gave birth 5 months ago to my second child. I am very worried this is ovarian cancer due to all I have read online. Does this sound normal for ovarian cancer? There has been no change in my bowel movements. My periods are very regular, but I do experience some hip and back pain occasionally on that same side.
